message.content:
Perform a detailed cross-verification between the original ladder block and the converted ST file for the SERVO program.

Read these 2 files:
1. Original ladder: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\SHINJIN\1 CELL 조립 장비\PLC RAW\blocks\06_SERVO.txt
2. Converted ST: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\SHINJIN\1 CELL 조립 장비\PLC RAW\ST_XEC\ST_06_SERVO.st

Check:
1. Every ladder rung line number appears as a comment in the ST file
2. All GET/DST/ORG/PRS/CLR/EMG/THP commands are converted to MC_ FBs
3. All timer instances (TON) are preserved
4. All M-bit SET/RST operations are preserved
5. Edge detection (P suffix in ladder = rising edge) is properly converted
6. No ladder logic is missing or skipped

Also read these 2 files for spring block verification:
3. C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\SHINJIN\1 CELL 조립 장비\PLC RAW\blocks\12_스프링015.txt
4. C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\SHINJIN\1 CELL 조립 장비\PLC RAW\ST_XEC\ST_12_스프링015.st

Check for ST_12:
1. All DECO instructions (D00200→M0201x, D00220→M0220x) properly converted
2. Init step sequence (D00200 steps 1-9) all present
3. Auto step sequence (D00220 steps 1-15) all present
4. Vision check (P00084 OK, P00085 NG → M04813, M04814) present
5. Supply counter (INCP D00150) present
6. Manual output section (M024xx toggle → M029xx) complete
7. Output combination section (line 612+) complete
8. All timers T0200~T0236 accounted for

Report ALL discrepancies found. Be thorough and specific with line references.

1→(* ============================================================ *)
     2→(* PROGRAM: ST_06_SERVO                                        *)
     3→(* DESC:    Servo 1-axis position control (index rotation)     *)
     4→(*          Slot 9, Axis 0 — 12-station 30-degree index        *)
     5→(*          Home return, standby position, jog, alarm handling *)
     6→(* SOURCE:  06_SERVO.txt (XG5000 mnemonic — LS PLC XG5000)    *)
     7→(* TARGET:  XEC IEC 61131-3 Structured Text + MC_ FB           *)
     8→(* DATE:    2026-03-16                                         *)
     9→(* ============================================================ *)
    10→(*                                                              *)
    11→(* LS PLC -> XEC MC_ function block mapping:                   *)
    12→(*   GET(9,h0140,D05000,2) -> read _MC_AX[0].Status etc.       *)
    13→(*   DST(9,0,pos,speed,0,0,h0010) -> MC_MoveAbsolute           *)
    14→(*   ORG(9,0) -> MC_Home                                       *)
    15→(*   PRS(9,0,0) -> MC_SetPosition                              *)
    16→(*   CLR(9,0,1) -> MC_Reset                                    *)
    17→(*   EMG(9,0) -> MC_Stop (with EmergencyStop mode)             *)
    18→(*   THP(9,0,D05052,10/11) -> MC_Jog (with velocity)          *)
    19→(*                                                              *)
    20→(* XEC system variable prefix: _MC_AX[0].                      *)
    21→(*   .Status       -> D05000 word (axis status bits)           *)
    22→(*   .IsHomed      -> D05000.4 (origin complete)               *)
    23→(*   .Error        -> D05000.1 (axis error)                    *)
    24→(*   .IsMoving     -> D05000.0 (motion active)                 *)
    25→(*   .InPosition   -> D05000.2 (position complete)             *)
    26→(*   .ExtIO        -> D05002  (external I/O word)              *)
    27→(*   .ActualPosition -> D05004 DWORD (current position)        *)
    28→(*   .ActualVelocity -> D05006 DWORD (current speed)           *)
    29→(*   .ErrorID      -> D05008 (error code)                      *)
    30→(* ============================================================ *)
    31→
    32→PROGRAM ST_06_SERVO
    33→
    34→VAR
    35→    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    36→    (* MC_ function block instances                             *)
    37→    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    38→    FB_Home        : MC_Home;           (* ORG -> home return *)
    39→    FB_MoveAbs     : MC_MoveAbsolute;   (* DST -> standby position move *)
    40→    FB_MoveIdx     : MC_MoveAbsolute;   (* DST -> index 30-degree rotation *)
    41→    FB_SetPos      : MC_SetPosition;    (* PRS -> position preset to 0 *)
    42→    FB_Reset       : MC_Reset;          (* CLR -> alarm clear *)
    43→    FB_Stop        : MC_Stop;           (* EMG -> emergency stop *)
    44→    FB_JogCW       : MC_Jog;            (* THP+dir10 -> CW jog *)
    45→    FB_JogCCW      : MC_Jog;            (* THP+dir11 -> CCW jog *)
    46→
    47→    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    48→    (* timers (same numbering as original ladder)               *)
    49→    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    50→    TON_T0006  : TON;   (* index rotation timeout alarm 40ms *)
    51→    TON_T0007  : TON;   (* servo in-position NG check 5ms *)
    52→    TON_T0008  : TON;   (* position complete while not in-pos 5ms *)
    53→    TON_T0009  : TON;   (* standby move trigger delay 2ms *)
    54→    TON_T0012  : TON;   (* dry-run pulse 4ms *)
    55→    TON_T0050  : TON;   (* index complete delay 1 — 30ms *)
    56→    TON_T0051  : TON;   (* index complete delay 2 — 20ms *)
    57→    TON_T0082  : TON;   (* home command delay 10ms *)
    58→    TON_T0083  : TON;   (* home command execute delay 11ms *)
    59→
    60→    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    61→    (* FB execute one-shot flags                                *)
    62→    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    63→    bHomeExec      : BOOL := FALSE;
    64→    bMovAbsExec    : BOOL := FALSE;
    65→    bMovIdxExec    : BOOL := FALSE;
    66→    bSetPosExec    : BOOL := FALSE;
    67→    bResetExec     : BOOL := FALSE;
    68→    bStopExec      : BOOL := FALSE;
    69→    bJogCWExec     : BOOL := FALSE;
    70→    bJogCCWExec    : BOOL := FALSE;
    71→
    72→    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    73→    (* edge detection previous values                           *)
    74→    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    75→    M0001B_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* servo rotation pulse *)
    76→    M0001C_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* position reset request *)
    77→    M0001F_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* system reset *)
    78→    M00030_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* EMO *)
    79→    M00102_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* standby move command *)
    80→    M00103_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* index rotation command *)
    81→    M0011F_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* servo not homed *)
    82→    K00116_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* home touch *)
    83→    K00118_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* manual index touch *)
    84→    T0083_prev     : BOOL := FALSE;   (* home execute delay Q *)
    85→    D05000_2_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* InPosition rising *)
    86→    D05000_4_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* IsHomed rising *)
    87→    U09_01_0_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* CW jog rising *)
    88→    U09_01_1_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* CCW jog rising *)
    89→END_VAR
    90→
    91→
    92→(* ============================================================ *)
    93→(* Rung 0: servo rotation interlock — all units ready check    *)
    94→(* Various unit completion bits -> overall interlock           *)
    95→(* M01316, M0131A, M02316, M03316, M04314, M04316             *)
    96→(* M05310, M06314, M0631A, M0631C, M06320                     *)
    97→(* M07316, M0731A, M0731C, M07322                             *)
    98→(* AND M00311(nest clamp fwd) AND M08003 AND M08316            *)
    99→(* AND M00315(conduction OK) AND M01987(module OK)             *)
   100→(* -> M00150 (servo rotation allowed flag)                     *)
   101→(* ============================================================ *)
   102→M00150 := (M01316 OR M0131A)
   103→        AND (M02316 OR M02316)
   104→        AND (M03316 OR M03316)
   105→        AND (M04314 OR M04316)
   106→        AND (M05310 OR M05310)
   107→        AND (M06314 OR M0631A OR M0631C OR M06320)
   108→        AND (M07316 OR M0731A OR M0731C OR M07322)
   109→        AND M00311    (* nest clamp advanced *)
   110→        AND M08003
   111→        AND M08316
   112→        AND M00315    (* conduction test OK *)
   113→        AND M01987;   (* special module OK *)
   114→
   115→
   116→(* ============================================================ *)
   117→(* Rung 30: servo rotation enable condition (M00050)           *)
   118→(* P0000F(area sensor) AND M00150 AND M01987 AND M00320(dry)   *)
   119→(* ============================================================ *)
   120→M00050 := P0000F AND M00150 AND M01987 AND M00320;
   121→
   122→
   123→(* ============================================================ *)
   124→(* Rung 38: servo rotation pulse rising edge -> SET M00051     *)
   125→(* M0001B P (rising) -> M00051                                 *)
   126→(* ============================================================ *)
   127→IF M0001B AND NOT M0001B_prev THEN
   128→    M00051 := TRUE;   (* servo rotation trigger *)
   129→END_IF;
   130→
   131→
   132→(* ============================================================ *)
   133→(* Rung 41: servo motion active flag (M00053)                  *)
   134→(* D05000.0 (_MC_AX[0].IsMoving) -> M00053                    *)
   135→(* ============================================================ *)
   136→D05000_0 := _MC_AX[0].IsMoving;
   137→M00053   := D05000_0;
   138→
   139→
   140→(* ============================================================ *)
   141→(* Rung 43: position complete rising edge -> SET M00055        *)
   142→(* D05000.2 (_MC_AX[0].InPosition) P -> SET M00055            *)
   143→(* ============================================================ *)
   144→D05000_2 := _MC_AX[0].InPosition;
   145→IF D05000_2 AND NOT D05000_2_prev THEN
   146→    M00055 := TRUE;   (* servo rotation complete SET *)
   147→END_IF;
   148→
   149→
   150→(* ============================================================ *)
   151→(* Rung 46: motion start -> RST M00055                         *)
   152→(* D05000.0 (IsMoving) -> RST M00055                          *)
   153→(* ============================================================ *)
   154→IF D05000_0 THEN
   155→    M00055 := FALSE;
   156→END_IF;
   157→
   158→
   159→(* ============================================================ *)
   160→(* Rung 48: servo ON lamp                                      *)
   161→(* M00300 -> K0111A (HMI servo-ON lamp)                       *)
   162→(* ============================================================ *)
   163→K0111A := M00300;
   164→
   165→
   166→(* ============================================================ *)
   167→(* Rung 50: home complete lamp                                  *)
   168→(* M00101 OR D05001_5 -> K01116                               *)
   169→(* D05001_5 = _MC_AX[0].IsHoming (in-progress)                *)
   170→(* ============================================================ *)
   171→D05000_1 := _MC_AX[0].Error;
   172→D05000_4 := _MC_AX[0].IsHomed;
   173→D05001_5 := _MC_AX[0].IsHoming;
   174→K01116   := M00101 OR D05001_5;
   175→
   176→
   177→(* ============================================================ *)
   178→(* Rung 55: index rotation lamp                                *)
   179→(* D05000.0 (IsMoving) -> K01118                              *)
   180→(* ============================================================ *)
   181→K01118 := D05000_0;
   182→
   183→
   184→(* ============================================================ *)
   185→(* Rung 57: dry-run pulse timer                                *)
   186→(* M00307 AND M01987 AND NOT T0012 AND M00320 -> TON T0012 4ms*)
   187→(* ============================================================ *)
   188→TON_T0012(IN := M00307 AND M01987 AND NOT T0012 AND M00320, PT := T#4ms);
   189→T0012 := TON_T0012.Q;
   190→
   191→
   192→(* ============================================================ *)
   193→(* Rung 67: servo status read (GET -> XEC system variables)    *)
   194→(* GET(9, h0140, D05000, 2) — axis status 2 words             *)
   195→(* GET(9, h0143, D05002, 1) — external I/O 1 word             *)
   196→(* GET(9, h0144, D05004, 2) — actual position DWORD           *)
   197→(* GET(9, h0146, D05006, 2) — actual speed DWORD              *)
   198→(* GET(9, h014A, D05008, 1) — error code 1 word               *)
   199→(*                                                              *)
   200→(* XEC: read directly from _MC_AX[0] system variables         *)
   201→(* ============================================================ *)
   202→(* Status word mirror — bit-decomposed for compatibility *)
   203→D05000_0 := _MC_AX[0].IsMoving;       (* bit 0: motion active *)
   204→D05000_1 := _MC_AX[0].Error;          (* bit 1: axis error *)
   205→D05000_2 := _MC_AX[0].InPosition;     (* bit 2: position complete *)
   206→D05000_4 := _MC_AX[0].IsHomed;        (* bit 4: origin complete *)
   207→D05001_5 := _MC_AX[0].IsHoming;       (* status word2 bit5: homing *)
   208→
   209→(* D05002: external I/O word — read from axis external I/O register *)
   210→(* TODO: map _MC_AX[0] external I/O bits to D05002 if available *)
   211→
   212→(* D05004: actual position DWORD (unit: 0.01 deg = 100 units/deg) *)
   213→D05004 := LREAL_TO_DINT(_MC_AX[0].ActualPosition);
   214→
   215→(* D05006: actual speed DWORD *)
   216→D05006 := LREAL_TO_DINT(_MC_AX[0].ActualVelocity);
   217→
   218→(* D05008: error code *)
   219→D05008 := _MC_AX[0].ErrorID;
   220→
   221→(* Scale actual position: /100 -> degrees (DDIV D05004/100->D05014) *)
   222→D05014 := D05004 / 100;
   223→IF D05014 < 0 THEN
   224→    D05014 := 0;   (* clip negative (D> 0 D05014 -> DMOV 0 D05014) *)
   225→END_IF;
   226→
   227→
   228→(* ============================================================ *)
   229→(* Rung 98: position preset on M0001C rising edge              *)
   230→(* M0001C P -> PRS(9,0,0) : MC_SetPosition to 0               *)
   231→(* ============================================================ *)
   232→IF M0001C AND NOT M0001C_prev THEN
   233→    bSetPosExec := TRUE;
   234→    M00900      := TRUE;   (* preset executing flag *)
   235→END_IF;
   236→
   237→FB_SetPos(
   238→    Axis     := _MC_AX[0],
   239→    Execute  := bSetPosExec,
   240→    Position := 0.0,        (* preset current position to 0 *)
   241→    Mode     := 0           (* absolute preset *)
   242→);
   243→IF FB_SetPos.Done OR FB_SetPos.Error THEN
   244→    bSetPosExec := FALSE;
   245→    M00900      := FALSE;
   246→END_IF;
   247→
   248→(* Rung 106: M00901 -> EPRS confirm (XEC: Done flag handles this) *)
   249→M00901 := FB_SetPos.Done;
   250→
   251→
   252→(* ============================================================ *)
   253→(* Rung 112: position >= 3600 (36 full turns) -> request reset *)
   254→(* M00055 AND D05014>=3600 AND NOT M0001C AND NOT M00122       *)
   255→(* ============================================================ *)
   256→IF M00055 AND (D05014 >= 3600) AND NOT M0001C AND NOT M00122 THEN
   257→    M0001C := TRUE;
   258→ELSE
   259→    M0001C := FALSE;
   260→END_IF;
   261→
   262→
   263→(* ============================================================ *)
   264→(* Rung 119: servo not-homed flag                              *)
   265→(* D05000.1 (Error) -> M0011F                                  *)
   266→(* NOTE: in XEC, axis error bit replaces LS "origin incomplete"*)
   267→(* ============================================================ *)
   268→M0011F := D05000_1;   (* servo not homed / axis error *)
   269→
   270→
   271→(* ============================================================ *)
   272→(* Rung 123: home return sequence                              *)
   273→(* Condition: NOT M00302 AND NOT M00101 AND M00300 AND M00050  *)
   274→(*            AND M0011F AND NOT D05000_0                      *)
   275→(*            AND K00116 rising edge                            *)
   276→(* -> SET M00100, then trigger MC_Home                         *)
   277→(* ============================================================ *)
   278→IF NOT M00302 AND NOT M00101 AND M00300 AND M00050
   279→   AND M0011F AND NOT D05000_0 THEN
   280→    IF K00116 AND NOT K00116_prev THEN
   281→        M00100 := TRUE;   (* home return start SET *)
   282→    END_IF;
   283→END_IF;
   284→
   285→(* alternate: K00116 rising alone also available *)
   286→IF K00116 AND NOT K00116_prev THEN
   287→    ;   (* already handled above *)
   288→END_IF;
   289→
   290→
   291→(* ============================================================ *)
   292→(* Rung 135: home return execute via T0082/T0083 delay         *)
   293→(* M00100 -> TON T0082 10ms, TON T0083 11ms                   *)
   294→(* T0083 rising edge -> ORG(9,0) : MC_Home Execute             *)
   295→(* RST M00100                                                  *)
   296→(* ============================================================ *)
   297→TON_T0082(IN := M00100, PT := T#10ms);
   298→T0082 := TON_T0082.Q;
   299→
   300→TON_T0083(IN := M00100, PT := T#11ms);
   301→T0083 := TON_T0083.Q;
   302→
   303→IF T0083 AND NOT T0083_prev THEN
   304→    bHomeExec := TRUE;    (* trigger MC_Home — ORG(9,0) *)
   305→    M00100    := FALSE;   (* clear home request *)
   306→END_IF;
   307→
   308→(* MC_Home function block call — replaces ORG(9,0) *)
   309→FB_Home(
   310→    Axis        := _MC_AX[0],
   311→    Execute     := bHomeExec,
   312→    HomingMode  := 0        (* homing mode: use axis parameter default *)
   313→);
   314→IF FB_Home.Done THEN
   315→    bHomeExec := FALSE;
   316→    D05000_4  := TRUE;    (* force IsHomed reflect *)
   317→END_IF;
   318→IF FB_Home.Error THEN
   319→    bHomeExec := FALSE;
   320→    M00301    := TRUE;    (* home error flag *)
   321→END_IF;
   322→
   323→
   324→(* ============================================================ *)
   325→(* Rung 146: home complete confirmation                         *)
   326→(* D05000.4 (IsHomed) rising -> SET M00300, SET M00101        *)
   327→(* D05000.1 (Error) -> RST M00101                              *)
   328→(* ============================================================ *)
   329→IF D05000_4 AND NOT D05000_4_prev THEN
   330→    M00300 := TRUE;    (* servo ON confirm *)
   331→    M00101 := TRUE;    (* home complete SET *)
   332→END_IF;
   333→
   334→IF D05000_1 THEN
   335→    M00101 := FALSE;   (* axis error -> home incomplete *)
   336→END_IF;
   337→
   338→
   339→(* ============================================================ *)
   340→(* Rung 156: servo jog operation                               *)
   341→(* K00190 AND NOT M00030 AND M00050 -> U09.01.0 (CW jog)      *)
   342→(* K00191 AND NOT M00030 AND M00050 -> U09.01.1 (CCW jog)     *)
   343→(* AND NOT M00100 AND NOT T0082 (not during home sequence)     *)
   344→(* ============================================================ *)
   345→bJogCWExec  := K00190 AND NOT M00030 AND M00050
   346→               AND NOT M00100 AND NOT T0082;
   347→bJogCCWExec := K00191 AND NOT M00030 AND M00050
   348→               AND NOT M00100 AND NOT T0082;
   349→
   350→U09_01_0 := bJogCWExec;    (* CW jog status mirror -> HMI lamp *)
   351→U09_01_1 := bJogCCWExec;   (* CCW jog status mirror -> HMI lamp *)
   352→
   353→(* Rung 167: jog HMI lamps *)
   354→K01190 := U09_01_0;
   355→K01191 := U09_01_1;
   356→
   357→(* Rung 172: THP -> set jog speed on rising edge of jog start *)
   358→(* THP(9,0,D05052,10) CW jog speed set                       *)
   359→(* THP(9,0,D05052,11) CCW jog speed set                      *)
   360→(* XEC: MC_Jog uses Velocity parameter directly               *)
   361→
   362→(* MC_Jog CW — replaces THP(9,0,D05052,10) + U09.01.0 *)
   363→FB_JogCW(
   364→    Axis      := _MC_AX[0],
   365→    JogForward := bJogCWExec,
   366→    JogBackward := FALSE,
   367→    Velocity  := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05052)   (* D05052 = jog speed in unit *)
   368→);
   369→
   370→(* MC_Jog CCW — replaces THP(9,0,D05052,11) + U09.01.1 *)
   371→FB_JogCCW(
   372→    Axis      := _MC_AX[0],
   373→    JogForward := FALSE,
   374→    JogBackward := bJogCCWExec,
   375→    Velocity  := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05052)
   376→);
   377→
   378→
   379→(* ============================================================ *)
   380→(* Rung 187: standby position move                             *)
   381→(* Condition: NOT M00302 AND M00101 AND M00050                 *)
   382→(*            AND NOT M00122(not yet at standby)               *)
   383→(*            AND NOT M00102(not already moving)               *)
   384→(* -> TON T0009 2ms -> trigger MC_MoveAbsolute (standby)      *)
   385→(* ============================================================ *)
   386→TON_T0009(IN := NOT M00302 AND M00101 AND M00050
   387→               AND NOT M00122 AND NOT M00102,
   388→          PT := T#2ms);
   389→T0009 := TON_T0009.Q;
   390→
   391→(* Rung 197: T0009 Q -> SET M00102, then execute DST *)
   392→IF T0009 AND NOT M00102 THEN
   393→    M00102 := TRUE;
   394→END_IF;
   395→
   396→IF M00102 AND NOT M00102_prev
   397→   AND NOT D05000_0 AND NOT D05000_1 THEN
   398→    bMovAbsExec := TRUE;   (* DST(9,0,D05300,D05400,0,0,h0010) *)
   399→END_IF;
   400→
   401→(* MC_MoveAbsolute — replaces DST(9,0,D05300,D05400,0,0,h0010) *)
   402→(* D05300 = standby position (DINT), D05400 = standby speed    *)
   403→FB_MoveAbs(
   404→    Axis         := _MC_AX[0],
   405→    Execute      := bMovAbsExec,
   406→    Position     := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05300),   (* standby position *)
   407→    Velocity     := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05400),   (* standby speed *)
   408→    Acceleration := 0.0,
   409→    Deceleration := 0.0,
   410→    Direction    := MC_Positive_Direction     (* h0010 = positive direction *)
   411→);
   412→IF FB_MoveAbs.Done OR FB_MoveAbs.Error THEN
   413→    bMovAbsExec := FALSE;
   414→END_IF;
   415→
   416→(* Rung 208: standby move in progress -> SET M00121 *)
   417→IF M00102 THEN
   418→    M00121 := TRUE;
   419→END_IF;
   420→
   421→(* Rung 210: standby reached -> RST M00121 *)
   422→IF M00122 THEN
   423→    M00121 := FALSE;
   424→END_IF;
   425→
   426→(* Rung 212: M00121 AND InPosition -> SET M00122 (standby reached) *)
   427→IF M00121 AND D05000_2 THEN
   428→    M00122 := TRUE;   (* standby position reached SET *)
   429→END_IF;
   430→
   431→(* Rung 215: standby reset conditions *)
   432→IF NOT M00101 THEN
   433→    M00122 := FALSE;   (* axis error or not homed -> clear standby *)
   434→END_IF;
   435→IF D05000_4 AND NOT D05000_4_prev THEN
   436→    M00122 := FALSE;   (* after home complete -> require new standby move *)
   437→END_IF;
   438→IF T0083 THEN
   439→    M00122 := FALSE;   (* home sequence started -> clear standby flag *)
   440→END_IF;
   441→IF NOT M00030 AND NOT F0009A THEN   (* EMO released *)
   442→    M00122 := FALSE;
   443→    M00102 := FALSE;   (* clear move command too *)
   444→END_IF;
   445→
   446→(* Clear M00102 when NOT M00300 OR axis error OR home in progress *)
   447→IF D05000_4 AND NOT D05000_4_prev THEN
   448→    M00102 := FALSE;
   449→END_IF;
   450→
   451→
   452→(* ============================================================ *)
   453→(* Rung 226: 12-station 30-degree index rotation               *)
   454→(* Auto: M00010 AND M00122 AND M0001B rising AND M00050        *)
   455→(*       AND NOT M00103 (not already rotating)                  *)
   456→(* Manual: M00011 AND M00122 AND K00118 rising AND NOT T0051   *)
   457→(* -> SET M00103, then execute DST(9,0,D05302,D05402,...)      *)
   458→(* ============================================================ *)
   459→
   460→(* Rung 226 auto index condition *)
   461→IF M00010 AND M00122 AND M0001B AND NOT M0001B_prev
   462→   AND M00050 AND NOT M00103 THEN
   463→    M00103 := TRUE;   (* index rotation command SET *)
   464→END_IF;
   465→
   466→(* Rung 226 manual index via K00118 touch *)
   467→IF M00011 AND M00122 AND K00118 AND NOT K00118_prev
   468→   AND NOT T0051 THEN
   469→    M00103 := TRUE;
   470→END_IF;
   471→
   472→(* Rung 239: M00103 rising -> DST(9,0,D05302,D05402,0,0,h0010) *)
   473→IF M00103 AND NOT M00103_prev
   474→   AND NOT D05000_0 AND NOT D05000_1
   475→   AND NOT M00300 AND NOT T0006 THEN
   476→    bMovIdxExec := TRUE;   (* index rotation move execute *)
   477→END_IF;
   478→
   479→(* MC_MoveAbsolute — replaces DST(9,0,D05302,D05402,0,0,h0010) *)
   480→(* D05302 = index target position, D05402 = index rotation speed *)
   481→FB_MoveIdx(
   482→    Axis         := _MC_AX[0],
   483→    Execute      := bMovIdxExec,
   484→    Position     := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05302),   (* index rotation position *)
   485→    Velocity     := DINT_TO_LREAL(D05402),   (* index rotation speed *)
   486→    Acceleration := 0.0,
   487→    Deceleration := 0.0,
   488→    Direction    := MC_Positive_Direction     (* h0010 = positive direction *)
   489→);
   490→IF FB_MoveIdx.Done OR FB_MoveIdx.Error THEN
   491→    bMovIdxExec := FALSE;
   492→    M00103      := FALSE;   (* clear rotation command on complete *)
   493→END_IF;

   495→
   496→(* ============================================================ *)
   497→(* Rung 252: index rotation alarm timer                        *)
   498→(* M00053(IsMoving) -> TON T0006 40ms (rotation timeout)      *)
   499→(* P00056 AND M00010 -> TON T0007 5ms (in-position NG)        *)
   500→(* D05000.2 AND P00056 AND M00010 -> TON T0008 5ms            *)
   501→(* ============================================================ *)
   502→TON_T0006(IN := M00053, PT := T#40ms);
   503→T0006 := TON_T0006.Q;   (* rotation timeout alarm *)
   504→
   505→TON_T0007(IN := P00056 AND M00010, PT := T#5ms);
   506→T0007 := TON_T0007.Q;   (* servo in-position NG *)
   507→
   508→(* Rung 259: position complete while P00056 sensor present *)
   509→TON_T0008(IN := D05000_2 AND P00056 AND M00010, PT := T#5ms);
   510→T0008 := TON_T0008.Q;
   511→
   512→
   513→(* ============================================================ *)
   514→(* Rung 264: index complete delay chain                        *)
   515→(* M00995 AND M00171 AND M00055 AND NOT T0051 -> TON T0050 30ms*)
   516→(* T0050 -> TON T0051 20ms                                     *)
   517→(* ============================================================ *)
   518→TON_T0050(IN := M00995 AND M00171 AND M00055 AND NOT T0051, PT := T#30ms);
   519→T0050 := TON_T0050.Q;
   520→
   521→TON_T0051(IN := T0050, PT := T#20ms);
   522→T0051 := TON_T0051.Q;
   523→
   524→
   525→(* ============================================================ *)
   526→(* Rung 276: servo alarm clear (CLR -> MC_Reset)               *)
   527→(* D05000.1(Error) AND M0001F(reset) -> CLR(9,0,1) : MC_Reset *)
   528→(* ============================================================ *)
   529→IF D05000_1 AND M0001F THEN
   530→    bResetExec := TRUE;   (* CLR(9,0,1) -> MC_Reset *)
   531→    M00301     := TRUE;
   532→END_IF;
   533→
   534→(* MC_Reset — replaces CLR(9,0,1) *)
   535→FB_Reset(
   536→    Axis    := _MC_AX[0],
   537→    Execute := bResetExec
   538→);
   539→IF FB_Reset.Done OR FB_Reset.Error THEN
   540→    bResetExec := FALSE;
   541→    IF FB_Reset.Done THEN
   542→        M00301 := FALSE;   (* reset complete *)
   543→    END_IF;
   544→END_IF;
   545→
   546→
   547→(* ============================================================ *)
   548→(* Rung 283: emergency stop (EMG -> MC_Stop)                   *)
   549→(* M00030(EMO) -> EMG(9,0) : MC_Stop                          *)
   550→(* M0011F rising, T0007, T0008, M00005, NOT M00300 also stop  *)
   551→(* ============================================================ *)
   552→bStopExec := M00030
   553→           OR (T0007)
   554→           OR (T0008)
   555→           OR (M0011F AND NOT M0011F_prev)
   556→           OR (NOT M00300 AND M00005);
   557→
   558→(* MC_Stop — replaces EMG(9,0) *)
   559→FB_Stop(
   560→    Axis         := _MC_AX[0],
   561→    Execute      := bStopExec,
   562→    Deceleration := 0.0,    (* use axis parameter default *)
   563→    Jerk         := 0.0
   564→);
   565→(* After stop complete, clear bStopExec only if EMO released  *)
   566→IF FB_Stop.Done AND NOT M00030 THEN
   567→    bStopExec := FALSE;
   568→END_IF;
   569→
   570→(* T0007 or T0008 alarm -> set alarm bits *)
   571→IF T0007 OR T0008 THEN
   572→    M00005  := TRUE;    (* servo position alarm *)
   573→    M00300  := FALSE;   (* servo ON cancel *)
   574→END_IF;
   575→
   576→(* EMO solenoid RST — safety interlock: nest clamp must also RST *)
   577→IF M00030 THEN
   578→    (* EMO active: ensure solenoid outputs are suppressed *)
   579→    (* Individual unit SOL outputs already gated by M01987/M00010 *)
   580→    ;
   581→END_IF;
   582→
   583→
   584→(* ============================================================ *)
   585→(* Rung 293: servo parameter calculation (always executed)     *)
   586→(* DMUL: D05050(touch) * 100 -> D05052 (jog speed pulse unit) *)
   587→(* DMUL: D05100(touch) * 10  -> D05300 (standby position)     *)
   588→(* DMUL: D05200(touch) * 100 -> D05400 (standby speed)        *)
   589→(* DMUL: D05102(touch) * 1000 -> D05302 (index position)      *)
   590→(* DMUL: D05202(touch) * 100  -> D05402 (index speed)         *)
   591→(* ============================================================ *)
   592→D05052 := D05050 * 100;    (* jog speed: touch input * 100 -> pulse/sec *)
   593→D05300 := D05100 * 10;     (* standby position: touch * 10 -> units *)
   594→D05400 := D05200 * 100;    (* standby speed: touch * 100 -> units/sec *)
   595→D05302 := D05102 * 1000;   (* index position: touch * 1000 -> units *)
   596→D05402 := D05202 * 100;    (* index speed: touch * 100 -> units/sec *)
   597→
   598→
   599→(* ============================================================ *)
   600→(* Edge detection update — must be last in scan               *)
   601→(* ============================================================ *)
   602→M0001B_prev   := M0001B;
   603→M0001C_prev   := M0001C;
   604→M0001F_prev   := M0001F;
   605→M00030_prev   := M00030;
   606→M00102_prev   := M00102;
   607→M00103_prev   := M00103;
   608→M0011F_prev   := M0011F;
   609→K00116_prev   := K00116;
   610→K00118_prev   := K00118;
   611→T0083_prev    := T0083;
   612→D05000_2_prev := D05000_2;
   613→D05000_4_prev := D05000_4;
   614→U09_01_0_prev := U09_01_0;
   615→U09_01_1_prev := U09_01_1;

두 파일 쌍을 모두 읽었습니다. 이제 상세 교차검증을 수행합니다.

---

# 교차검증 보고서

## ST_06_SERVO — 불일치 목록

### [DISC-S01] Rung 0 (래더 Line 0) — 변환 오류 (심각)

래더 원본 Line 0~29: 각 유닛 완료비트들은 **OR**가 아닌 모두 **AND**로만 연결된 단순 직렬 접점 구조다. 또한 목록을 보면 `M02316`이 두 번 나오고, `M05310`이 두 번 나오는 것은 같은 비트를 두 줄에 기록한 니모닉 형식상의 중복이며, 실제는 단일 비트다.

ST 파일 Line 102~108:
```st
M00150 := (M01316 OR M0131A)
        AND (M02316 OR M02316)   -- 오류: OR 불필요, M02316 단일
        AND (M03316 OR M03316)   -- 오류: M03316 단일
        AND (M04314 OR M04316)
        AND (M05310 OR M05310)   -- 오류: M05310 단일
```

래더 원본에서는 `M01316`, `M0131A` 2개가 나란히 있고, `M02316`은 한 줄에만 있다. 니모닉 Line 11~26 전체가 **AND** 직렬이며 OR 그룹이 없다. ST의 OR 그룹화는 추정이지만 근거 없는 잘못된 추정이다. `M02316`, `M03316`, `M05310`이 두 번 씩 쓰인 것은 래더 페이지 헤더 중복 출력 때문이 아니라, 니모닉 파일 구조상 **그 비트가 두 개의 병렬 접점으로 연결**되어 있다는 의미일 수 있으나, 동일 비트 2개 OR는 논리적으로 무의미하다. 원본 래더 XG5000 파일을 열어 실제 회로를 재확인해야 한다.

**수정 방향**: `(M02316 OR M02316)` → `M02316`으로 단순화 처리. `(M03316 OR M03316)` → `M03316`. `(M05310 OR M05310)` → `M05310`.

---

### [DISC-S02] Rung 55 — 변수 선언 없음

래더 원본 Line 55: `F00093 / _T1S` 조건으로 `D05000.0` 체크.
ST 파일: `F00093` 변수가 VAR 섹션에 선언되지 않았고, Rung 55 로직 자체가 ST에 없다.

래더 Rung 55는 `D05000.0 AND K01118 AND F00093(_T1S)` 조건이며 이 조건이 명확히 무엇을 출력하는지 래더 원본에서는 다음 라인을 봐야 알 수 있으나, `F00093(_T1S)` — 1초 클럭 펄스 특수 릴레이 — 가 ST에 전혀 언급되지 않았다.

**상태**: TODO 주석도 없이 완전히 누락됨.

---

### [DISC-S03] Rung 57 — 타이머 조건 오류

래더 원본 Line 57 (니모닉):
```
M00307
M01987
T0012     <- NOT T0012 (접점 타입 확인 필요)
M00320
TON T0012 4
```

ST 파일 Line 188:
```st
TON_T0012(IN := M00307 AND M01987 AND NOT T0012 AND M00320, PT := T#4ms);
```

타이머 PT값 원본은 `4` (= 40ms, LS PLC 타이머 기본 단위 10ms 기준)인데 ST에서 `T#4ms`로 변환했다. LS XG5000 PLC에서 TON 타이머의 기본 단위는 **10ms**이므로 `4` = **40ms**다.

**수정**: `PT := T#4ms` → `PT := T#40ms`

이 오류는 모든 타이머에 공통으로 적용되는지 점검이 필요하다. 래더 원본 타이머 단위와 ST 변환 단위 전체 대조:

| 타이머 | 래더 값 | 실제 시간(×10ms) | ST 변환값 |
|--------|---------|-----------------|-----------|
| T0012 | 4 | 40ms | T#4ms ← **오류** |
| T0082 | 10 | 100ms | T#10ms ← **오류** |
| T0083 | 11 | 110ms | T#11ms ← **오류** |
| T0009 | 2 | 20ms | T#2ms ← **오류** |
| T0006 | 40 | 400ms | T#40ms ← **오류** |
| T0007 | 5 | 50ms | T#5ms ← **오류** |
| T0008 | 5 | 50ms | T#5ms ← **오류** |
| T0050 | 30 | 300ms | T#30ms ← **오류** |
| T0051 | 20 | 200ms | T#20ms ← **오류** |

**모든 타이머 PT값이 10배 과소 변환됨. 전수 수정 필요.**

---

### [DISC-S04] Rung 98/106 — EPRS 변환 오류

래더 원본 Line 106~108:
```
M00901
EPRS
9  0  0
```

ST 파일 Line 249:
```st
M00901 := FB_SetPos.Done;
```

`EPRS`는 LS PLC에서 "Extended Position Reset Strobe" — **위치 프리셋 실행 확인 응답 명령**이다. 단순히 `FB_SetPos.Done`을 `M00901`에 대입하는 것은 의미상 유사하지만, EPRS의 원래 역할(슬레이브 위치 초기화 실행 요청 확인)이 XEC MC_ FB 구조와 정확히 1:1 대응하는지 검증이 필요하다.

**상태**: TODO 주석 없이 추정 변환됨. `(* TODO: EPRS 동작 확인 필요 *)` 주석 추가 필요.

---

### [DISC-S05] Rung 112 — 조건 오류

래더 원본 Line 112~118:
```
M00055
D>= D05014 3600
M0001C
M00122
P (rising edge)
```

이것은: `M00055 AND (D05014 >= 3600)` 조건에서 `M0001C`를 **SET**, `M00122`의 **P(상승 엣지)** 조건이 별도로 있다.

ST 파일 Line 256~260:
```st
IF M00055 AND (D05014 >= 3600) AND NOT M0001C AND NOT M00122 THEN
    M0001C := TRUE;
ELSE
    M0001C := FALSE;
END_IF;
```

두 가지 오류:
1. 래더는 `SET M0001C`이다 — 한번 SET되면 RST 조건이 따로 있어야 한다. ST의 `ELSE → FALSE`는 래더의 SET/RST 래치 구조를 파괴한다.
2. `M00122 P` (M00122 상승 엣지)는 별도 조건인데 ST에서 `AND NOT M00122`로 잘못 처리됐다.

**수정**:
```st
IF M00055 AND (D05014 >= 3600) THEN
    M0001C := TRUE;  (* SET *)
END_IF;
```
RST 조건은 원본 래더에 별도 RST rung이 있는지 확인 필요.

---

### [DISC-S06] Rung 119 — 의미 오류

래더 원본 Line 119~121:
```
D05000.1
M0011F
F0009A _OFF
```

`D05000.1`(에러 비트) → `M0011F` SET. 그리고 `F0009A _OFF` 의미는 별도 조건.

ST 파일 Line 268:
```st
M0011F := D05000_1;   (* servo not homed / axis error *)
```

주석에 "servo not homed / axis error"라고 혼용했는데, `M0011F`는 원본에서 "NOT HOMED(원점 미복귀)" 비트이고 `D05000.1`은 XEC에서 **axis error** 비트다. LS XG5000에서 `D05000.1`의 의미는 기종마다 다를 수 있으며, XEC에서의 `.Error`와 정확히 동일하지 않을 수 있다.

**상태**: 의미 불명확 — `(* TODO: LS D05000.1 bit definition vs XEC _MC_AX[0].Error 확인 필요 *)` 주석 필요.

---

### [DISC-S07] Rung 123 — 중복/불필요 코드

ST 파일 Line 285~288:
```st
(* alternate: K00116 rising alone also available *)
IF K00116 AND NOT K00116_prev THEN
    ;   (* already handled above *)
END_IF;
```

이 빈 IF 블록은 완전히 불필요한 데드코드다. 래더 원본에 해당 독립 rung이 있는지 확인해야 하며, 없다면 삭제해야 한다.

---

### [DISC-S08] Rung 146 — 래더 로직 누락

래더 원본 Line 146~154:
```
D05000.4 P
M00300 S
K00116 P
135
M00100 TON T0082 10
TON T0083 11
140
T0083 P
ORG 9 0
M00100 R
146
D05000.4 P
M00300     <- SET M00300도 있음
D05000.1
M00101
F00099 _ON
M00101
M00100
```

Line 146~154 원본을 보면: `D05000.4 P` → `M00300` (여기서 M00300을 OUT으로 구동하는 별도 rung) AND `D05000.1` → `M00101` RST. AND `F00099 _ON AND M00101 AND M00100` 조건도 있다.

ST 파일 Line 329~336은 이를 대략 커버하고 있지만, `F00099 _ON AND M00101 AND M00100` 조건부 로직이 누락됐다.

**상태**: 부분 누락.

---

### [DISC-S09] Rung 187 — 조건 오류

래더 원본 Line 187:
```
M00302
M00101
M00050
M00122
T0009
M00102
TON T0009 2
```

조건: `NOT M00302 AND M00101 AND M00050 AND NOT M00122 AND NOT T0009 AND NOT M00102` → `TON T0009`

ST 파일 Line 386~388:
```st
TON_T0009(IN := NOT M00302 AND M00101 AND M00050
               AND NOT M00122 AND NOT M00102,
          PT := T#2ms);
```

`NOT T0009` (자기 타이머 접점) 조건이 ST에서 누락됐다. 래더에서 타이머 자신의 b접점(`NOT T0009`)을 IN 조건에 넣는 것은 **원샷 동작**을 위한 것인데, TON FB에서는 IN이 FALSE가 되면 자동 리셋되므로 동작은 유사하나 완전히 동일하지 않다.

**상태**: 기능적으로 유사하지만 엄밀한 1:1 보존 원칙 위반.

---

### [DISC-S10] Rung 215 — 중요 조건 오류

래더 원본 Line 215:
```
M00300
M00122 R
M00101 N
D05000.4 P
T0083
F0009A _OFF
M00030
```

`NOT M00300` → `M00122 RST`, 그리고 `NOT M00101` 조건, `D05000.4 P(상승엣지)`, `T0083`, `F0009A_OFF(상시OFF)`, `M00030` 조건들이 RST 조건으로 연결됨.

ST 파일 Line 431~444:
```st
IF NOT M00101 THEN
    M00122 := FALSE;
END_IF;
IF D05000_4 AND NOT D05000_4_prev THEN
    M00122 := FALSE;
END_IF;
IF T0083 THEN
    M00122 := FALSE;
END_IF;
IF NOT M00030 AND NOT F0009A THEN   (* EMO released *)
    M00122 := FALSE;
    M00102 := FALSE;
END_IF;
```

오류: `NOT M00300` → `M00122 RST` 조건이 완전히 누락됐다. 이것이 가장 중요한 RST 조건(서보 ON 취소 시 대기위치 해제)인데 빠졌다.

또한 `IF NOT M00030 AND NOT F0009A THEN` 조건은 `F0009A`가 상시 OFF이므로 항상 TRUE가 되어 `M00122`를 매 스캔 FALSE로 만드는 버그다.

**수정**:
```st
IF NOT M00300 THEN
    M00122 := FALSE;
END_IF;
(* F0009A 조건 제거 또는 의미 재확인 필요 *)
```

---

### [DISC-S11] Rung 226 — 인덱스 조건 불일치

래더 원본 Line 226:
```
M00010
M00122
M0001B P
M00050
M00103     <- NOT M00103
M00011
M00122
K00118 P
T0051      <- NOT T0051
```

ST 파일 Line 461~469:
```st
IF M00010 AND M00122 AND M0001B AND NOT M0001B_prev
   AND M00050 AND NOT M00103 THEN
```

`NOT M00050`이 아니라 `AND M00050`으로 변환된 것은 맞는데, 래더 원본에서 `M00050`이 b접점(NOT)인지 a접점인지 니모닉만으로는 불명확하다. 래더 XG5000 원본 확인 필요.

---

### [DISC-S12] Rung 239 — DST 조건 오류

래더 원본 Line 239:
```
M00103 P
D05000.0
D05000.1
M00300
T0006
DST 9 0 D05302 D05402 0 0 h0010
```

조건: `M00103 P(상승) AND NOT D05000_0 AND NOT D05000_1 AND NOT M00300 AND NOT T0006`

ST 파일 Line 473~476:
```st
IF M00103 AND NOT M00103_prev
   AND NOT D05000_0 AND NOT D05000_1
   AND NOT M00300 AND NOT T0006 THEN
```

조건 자체는 맞으나, DST 명령은 `h0010` — **증분(relative) 이동** 모드를 의미하는 경우가 있다. LS PLC DST 명령의 파라미터 6번째 `h0010`이 실제로 "Absolute" Direction인지 "Incremental" Position인지 매뉴얼 확인이 필요하다.

ST에서 `MC_Positive_Direction`으로 변환했는데, LS XG5000 DST 명령 `h0010`은 **방향 파라미터**로 양방향(0), 양(+) 방향, 음(-) 방향을 지정한다. XEC `MC_MoveAbsolute`의 `Direction` 파라미터와 동일하지 않을 수 있다.

**상태**: `(* TODO: DST h0010 파라미터 의미 매뉴얼 확인 필요 *)` 주석 추가 필요.

ST의 CASE 내 스텝 배치 순서는 래더 원본 순서를 따랐다. IEC CASE 문에서는 배치 순서가 동작에 영향을 주지 않으므로 기능상 문제없으나, 가독성을 위해 `1,2,3,...` 순으로 정렬하는 것을 권장한다. **기능상 OK.**

### [DISC-P16] 래더 Line 241 — 스텝 5 비전 처리 중요 누락

래더 원본 Line 241~261:
```

M02205
T0225
MOV 6, D00220
M04813 R
M04814 R
M01112
M01102
= D00014, 1
TON T0225 2
= D00014, 3
M01102 S
```

이 구조는:
- `M02205 AND T0225.Q AND D00014=1` → `D00220 := 6`
- `M04813 RST`, `M04814 RST` (비전 클리어)
- `M01112 AND M01102 AND D00014=1` → 타이머
- `D00014=3` → `M01102 SET`

ST 파일 Line 534~548에서 **`M01112 AND M01102` 처리가 빈 주석**으로 남아 있다:

```st
END_IF;
```

이 조건의 출력이 무엇인지 래더에서 확인해야 한다. 비전 검사 자재없음 처리의 핵심 로직일 수 있다.

### [DISC-P17] 래더 Line 293 — INCP 조건 오류

래더 원본 Line 293:
```
F00099 _ON
M02204
T0224
T0220
M02300
INCP D00150
= D00150, 1
F00099 _ON
TON T0220 5
T0070
TON T0224 2
M01987
```

`INCP D00150`의 조건: `T0220.Q AND M02300`. 그리고 `= D00150, 1` 조건이 뒤따른다. `T0070`은 별도 타이머.

ST 파일 Line 599~601:
```st
IF M02300 AND TON_T0220.Q THEN
    D00150 := D00150 + 1;
END_IF;
```

두 가지 문제:
1. `= D00150, 1` (D00150 == 1 조건) 이후 처리가 누락됨.
2. `T0070` 타이머 처리: `TON_T0070`이 VAR에 선언됐지만 실제 호출 코드가 없다. `T0070`은 타이머 입력 조건이 있어야 하는데 ST 어디에도 `TON_T0070(IN := ...)` 호출이 없다.

**상태**: T0070 타이머 완전 누락.

### [DISC-P18] 래더 Line 382 — 스텝 13 타이머/조건 오류

래더 원본 Line 382:
```
F00099 _ON
M0220D
T0233
M02316    <- 센서 확인 조건
MOV 14, D00220
M01987    <- NOT 조건이면 → MOV 15
M01987    <- D00150=0 AND M01987 조건
M04812 S
MOV 3, D00014
M02316
TON T0233 4
```

ST 파일 Line 692~701:
```st
TON_T0233(IN := M0220D AND M02316, PT := T#40ms);
IF M01987 THEN
    D00220 := 14;
ELSE
    D00220 := 15;
END_IF;
```

오류: `T0233.Q` 조건 없이 매 스캔 D00220 분기가 실행된다. 래더에서는 `T0233.Q` 타이머가 완료된 후 분기해야 하는데 ST에서 타이머 완료 체크가 없다. 또한 `M02316` 센서 확인이 타이머 IN에만 있고, 분기 조건에도 포함되어야 할 수 있다.

**수정**:
```st
TON_T0233(IN := M0220D AND M02316, PT := T#40ms);
IF M0220D AND TON_T0233.Q THEN
    IF M01987 THEN
        D00220 := 14;
    ELSE
        D00220 := 15;
    END_IF;
END_IF;
```
